business_meaning: Total Debt / Total Assets — core leverage risk
Baa yield (lagged) — credit spreads / risk appetite
Federal Funds rate lagged 1 year — monetary policy tightness
Baa corporate yield lagged — credit spreads & risk appetite
Aaa corporate yield lagged — high-grade cost of debt
Stock Price (Fiscal Year End) — market signal of distress
Stockholders' Equity (Book Value) — net worth (low/negative = insolvency risk)
Market Capitalization (Decile) — firm size (small caps are riskier)
Stock Return Volatility (12M) — uncertainty and risk
Net Income — bottom-line profit (losses signal distress)
Working Capital / Total Assets — short-term liquidity buffer
Market Value of Equity / Total Liabilities — market leverage (low = distress)
12-Month Stock Return — market performance (large drops precede default)
